arts.ttl: Hansi Flick slams "disrespectful" Jude Bellingham after Real Madrid star's red card
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham was shown a red card for dissent as Real Madrid drew 1-1 with Osasuna on Saturday and Barcelona manager Hansi Flick has weighed in on the situation

arts.ttl: Barcelona given free run at top summer target
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have officially ended their pursuit of Jonathan Tah, leaving Barcelona with a free run at their top defensive target. In late 2024, reports surfaced that rather than Bayern, it was actually Barcelona who were closing in on an agreement with Tah for a free transfer in the summer.

arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona are expressing a keen interest in the signature of Borussia Dortmund talent Jamie Gittens. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have on Sunday provided an insight…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick takes swipe at Jude Bellingham's behaviour after dissent red card
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick was not impressed by Jude Bellingham and warned his players to avoid replicating his behaviour with referees.

arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted lineup vs Rayo Vallecano - La Liga

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick gives verdict on La Liga title race ahead of Barça vs Rayo
arts.sum: Hansi Flick was asked in a press conference on Sunday if he was aware of the slip-ups by the Madrid teams and what statement his side needs to make against a dangerous Rayo side, and the German coach made it clear Barça need to show a title-winning mentality on Monday. “I want to be judged by how we play and by the titles we win.
